app.workspaceSwitchPrompt: Switching workspace opens a new conversation context. Continue?
app.workspaceManageTitle: Workspace management is still in progress
app.workspaceManageDescription: Switching is ready now. Full workspace management will come next.
app.compressNotNeeded: Context does not need compression yet
app.deleteSessionDescription: This cannot be undone. The conversation will be permanently removed from the current workspace history.
app.messageSavePartialError: The response was generated, but saving the conversation failed.
app.gatewayUnavailableDescription: The app could not connect to {target}. Open settings to update the server address or port, then try again.
app.gatewayStatusInlineDescription: Current target: {target}. Open settings to update the server address or port, or retry the connection check.
app.terminalFocusDescription: The terminal now lives as a global bottom workspace instead of a standalone large page. You can open it from any view, and this screen becomes the focused terminal mode.
app.terminalFocusHint: When you switch to the terminal view, the bottom terminal panel expands first and stays linked to the current workspace.

nav.homeDescription: View workspace overview and quick actions
nav.chatDescription: Continue the current chat and send new messages
nav.promptMarketDescription: Create and manage AI digital workers
nav.integrationsDescription: Manage external service integrations and API bindings

chat.historicalSummary: Previous messages were condensed into a summary.
chat.emptyTitle: Design, build and ship from one workspace
chat.emptyDescription: Start a new task from this workspace, or ask me to design UI, inspect files, or break down a plan.
chat.suggestionRedesignDescription: Design a modern UI based on my description
chat.suggestionAnalyzeDescription: Read the workspace and give me a structured summary
chat.suggestionPlanDescription: Break the work into product, frontend, backend and validation steps

input.placeholder: Type a message, workspace task, or refactor goal. Use / for commands and $ for skills
input.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

skills.title: Skill Center
skills.description: Manage installed skills, toolsets, and market items for Hermes Slate Desk.
skills.noResultDescription: Try another keyword, or switch back to All to browse the full list.
skills.useCasesDescription: Best used when you need structured workflows, domain expertise, or automation assistance to keep the conversation focused.
skills.marketIndexNote: Market data comes from the official skills-index.json
skills.installedInfoDescription: This list comes directly from the installed skills in your local Hermes environment, not mock data.
skills.emptyInstalledTitle: No installed skills match the current filters
skills.emptyInstalledDescription: Adjust the query or category, or install a new skill from the market.
skills.loadingToolsetsDescription: Syncing current toolset status from the local Hermes CLI.
skills.emptyToolsetsTitle: No toolsets match the current search
skills.emptyToolsetsDescription: Try another keyword or verify the Hermes CLI is available.
skills.loadingMarketDescription: Fetching installable skills from the official index.
skills.emptyMarketTitle: No market skills match the current filters
skills.emptyMarketDescription: Try another query or source filter.
skills.loadMarketError: Failed to load the skill market
skills.installVerifyError: The install command finished, but the skill was not found in the installed list.
skills.toolsetsReadonly: Toolset status is managed by the Hermes CLI
skills.noPreview: No preview content is available right now.

cron.title: Cron Jobs
cron.description: Create, review, and run scheduled jobs.
cron.builderHint: Define what the task should do first, then schedule it visually. Most users should never need to write raw cron.
cron.nameHint: The name is only for your own management later and does not affect execution.
cron.promptPlaceholder: What should the agent do each time this job runs?
cron.promptHint: Be explicit about the goal, scope, and output format. For example: summarize the 3 most important updates from yesterday and add 1 recommendation for today.
cron.scheduleHint: If cron syntax feels unfamiliar, start with the visual options above and switch to custom only for advanced cases.
cron.customHelp: In advanced mode you can enter a full cron expression manually.
cron.deliverHint: Start with local delivery to validate the task output, then switch to Telegram, Slack, or email later if needed.
cron.noJobs: There are no cron jobs configured right now. Create one above to get started.
cron.loadingDescription: Syncing cron jobs from the local Hermes WebUI.
cron.createMissing: Please fill in both the prompt and the cron schedule.
cron.loadErrorFinal: Cron jobs still could not be loaded after multiple retries
cron.dependencyDescription: Creating cron jobs requires the Python package `croniter`. Check the current environment first, then install it if needed.
cron.dependencyServiceHint: If Hermes is running inside a virtual environment, install `croniter` in that environment instead.
cron.dependencyRestartHint: The dependency is installed, but the current dashboard process is still using the old import state. Restart the dashboard, then try creating the job again.
cron.dependencyRetryHint: After installation succeeds, click “Create job” again.
cron.dependencyUnknownHint: Click “Check environment” to confirm whether `croniter` is available in the current Python environment.
cron.actionError: Failed to run the cron action
cron.listHint: This page prioritizes the job list first. Creating a new job opens a separate panel so the scheduled list stays visible.

sessionsPage.title: Session Management
sessionsPage.description: View, search, and manage saved conversations.
sessionsPage.pinnedEmptyDescription: Pinned conversations will stay here so important context is always within reach.
sessionsPage.historyEmptyDescription: Regular conversations will appear here after you start and save them.
sessionsPage.emptyDescription: Try another keyword, or start a new conversation first.

logsPage.title: Log Management
logsPage.description: Inspect Hermes gateway, agent, and tool logs.
logsPage.loadingDescription: Syncing log output from the local Hermes WebUI.
logsPage.emptyDescription: Try another file, level, or component filter.

modelsPage.title: Model Management
modelsPage.description: Manage cloud providers, custom endpoints, local model access, API keys, base URLs, and default models in one place.
modelsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search entries, env vars, base URLs, or default models...
modelsPage.helper: This page is the model configuration center for the AI app. Cloud providers, custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints, and local model servers can all be managed here.
modelsPage.emptyDescription: Nothing matches the current query. Try another keyword.
modelsPage.providerCountHint: Number of providers currently available to configure
modelsPage.configuredHint: Providers that already have an API key configured
modelsPage.defaultHint: The default model that should be used first
modelsPage.providerRailHint: Pick an entry on the left to manage cloud providers, custom endpoints, or local model access.
modelsPage.noProviderSelectedDescription: Choose an entry from the left rail to open its access settings and default model.
modelsPage.providerHeroDescription: Finish API access first, then assign the default model. Advanced controls can come afterwards.
modelsPage.customHeroActiveDescription: The current primary model is already using a custom endpoint. This panel shows the live config, and saving here will overwrite the existing custom-endpoint settings.
modelsPage.customHeroInactiveDescription: Use this panel to switch the primary model to a custom endpoint. The current primary model is not using this path yet; it will switch only after you save.
modelsPage.localHeroActiveDescription: The current primary model is already using a local model server. This panel shows the live config, and saving here will overwrite the existing local access settings.
modelsPage.localHeroInactiveDescription: Use this panel to switch the primary model to local-model access. The current primary model is not using this path yet; it will switch only after you save.
modelsPage.localPresetsHint: Click a preset to prefill the usual Base URL. You can still tweak it before saving.
modelsPage.connectionDescription: Configure API keys and base URLs so this provider can actually be used.
modelsPage.customConnectionDescription: Set the Base URL and API key for an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Saving will switch Hermes to custom access.
modelsPage.localConnectionDescription: Set the Base URL for your local server. The API key is usually optional, and saving will switch Hermes to custom access.
modelsPage.customBaseUrlDescription: Enter the OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL exposed by your company gateway or third-party model proxy.
modelsPage.localBaseUrlDescription: Enter the local model server URL exposed by Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, or another self-hosted runtime.
modelsPage.customApiKeyDescription: Fill this in when your custom endpoint requires authentication.
modelsPage.localApiKeyDescription: Local services usually allow this to stay empty. Fill it in only if your runtime requires auth.
modelsPage.modelDescription: Set the default model for this provider so future runs have a sensible default.
modelsPage.customModelDescription: Choose the model ID that Hermes should use by default for this custom endpoint.
modelsPage.localModelDescription: Choose the model ID exposed by your local server, such as the model name you serve through Ollama or LM Studio.
modelsPage.customDefaultModelDescription: Enter the exact model ID exposed by your custom endpoint.
modelsPage.localDefaultModelDescription: Enter the actual model name exposed by your local server, such as qwen2.5:14b or llama-3.1-8b-instruct.
modelsPage.defaultModelUnavailable: This provider does not expose a dedicated default model field yet.
modelsPage.advancedDescription: Use this section for provider-specific default reasoning parameters. In the first version, access and default models matter most.
modelsPage.advancedEmpty: This provider does not currently expose separate default reasoning parameters.
modelsPage.parameterPlaceholder: Enter a value such as 0.2 or 4096
modelsPage.comingSoonDescription: This area can later grow into provider toggles, default temperature, max tokens, reasoning effort, connection tests, and automatic model discovery.

memory.title: Memory Management
memory.description: Organize long-term preferences, project context, and summaries with a clearer hierarchy of memory heat.
memory.loadingDescription: Please wait while the memory library is being prepared.
memory.emptyDescription: Try a different heat filter, or add a new long-term memory manually.
memory.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. The memory will be removed from long-term conversation context.

tasks.title: Task Board
tasks.description: Keep pending, active, and completed work in one modern work panel so momentum stays visible.
tasks.loadingDescription: Your task list will be ready in a moment.
tasks.emptyDescription: Create a task or switch the status filter to see other work.
tasks.toggleHint: Click the circle on the left to toggle completion
tasks.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. If the task is still active, consider marking it complete instead of removing it.

files.title: Workspace Files
files.description: Browse folders and preview workspace files.
files.directoryLoadingDescription: Syncing the current workspace file structure.
files.directoryEmptyDescription: Create a file or folder, or switch to another path to keep browsing.
files.directorySummary: This directory currently contains {folders} folders and {files} files.
files.searchPlaceholder: Search files and folders in this directory...
files.searchResultsHint: Showing the file-tree results that match your search.
files.searchEmptyDescription: Try another keyword, or move back up the directory tree and browse elsewhere.
files.treeDescription: Browse folders and files like an editor explorer.
files.treeSearchDescription: Only matching files and the folders along their paths stay visible.
files.openExternalSuccess: Opened with the system default app
files.openExternalError: Failed to open with the system app
files.unsupportedPdfTitle: PDF preview is not embedded yet
files.unsupportedPdfDescription: Use the “Open externally” button above to view this PDF in your system default app.
files.unsupportedOfficeTitle: Office files are not embedded yet
files.unsupportedOfficeDescription: Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files are not parsed inside the app yet. You can copy the path or open them with the system default app.
files.unsupportedBinaryTitle: This file type is not previewable yet
files.unsupportedBinaryDescription: Binary files are no longer forced into text preview, so you should not see garbled output here. Copy the path or open the file externally instead.
files.previewDescription: Select a file on the left to preview it here.
files.noSelectionDescription: Pick a file from the left list, or enter a folder to keep browsing.
files.folderPreviewDescription: Click the item in the left list to enter the directory and keep browsing deeper.
files.previewLoadingDescription: Hang on for a moment while the preview loads.
files.deleteDescription: {name} will be removed from the current workspace. This action cannot be undone.

terminal.title: Workspace Terminal
terminal.description: Run commands in an interactive workspace terminal.

settings.title: App Settings
settings.description: Manage theme, language, and the current agent in one place so the desktop flow stays consistent.
settings.themeLightDescription: Bright and clean for daytime work
settings.themeDarkDescription: Lower contrast strain for night work
settings.liveApplyHint: Theme and language apply immediately after selection.
settings.languageHint: The dropdown can scale as more languages are added later without changing the interaction model.
settings.userNicknameHint: The nickname is saved in the local config.json file.
settings.serverAddressPlaceholder: For example 127.0.0.1 or a LAN host
settings.connectionHint: If Hermes is not running locally, update the address or port here and save before retrying.
settings.agentHint: Hermes Agent is currently used by the desktop app.
settings.invalidHost: Please enter a valid server address

workspace.localDirectory: Workspace comes from a local directory
workspace.manageDescription: Manage local workspace directories and keep sessions, files, attachments, and the Hermes working directory aligned with the active workspace.
workspace.createDescription: Choose a local directory for a new Hermes workspace.
workspace.editDescription: Update the workspace name, path, or icon.
workspace.pathPlaceholder: Choose or enter a local directory path

toolSteps.sidebarDescription: Real Hermes tool events and response deltas appear here while a request is running.
toolSteps.idleDescription: This side panel stays visible and will show the next tool events and reply draft here.
toolSteps.waiting: Waiting for real Hermes execution events...

home.title: Home
home.welcomeLogin: Hi! {nickname}, the context is still warm 🙂
home.description: A focused command center for recent work, live status, and everyday actions. Confirm the system is ready, then jump straight back into context.
home.dashboardOverviewDescription: Key signals in one compact view: chats, notes, jobs, and health.
home.activityTrendDescription: A 7-day activity mix of chats, notes, and scheduled job runs.
home.quickActionsDescription: Common actions live in one command area so you can move without hunting through menus.
home.quickNewNoteDescription: Capture ideas, plans, or meeting notes
home.quickHermesDescription: Configure models, skills, and runtime features
home.quickSettingsDescription: Adjust language, theme, and connection options
home.continueWorkDescription: Recent chats and notes sit side by side so you can return to context quickly.
home.emptyConversationsDescription: Start a new chat and it will appear here.
home.emptyNotesDescription: Create the first note to keep important context.
home.cronOverviewDescription: Watch upcoming jobs and states that need attention.
home.dashboardConfigImpact: Affects app config file loading. Change it in App Settings -> Connection Status.
home.emptyCronDescription: Create a scheduled job and the next run will appear here.
home.systemStatusDescription: Connection, runtime, and workspace status in one place.
home.platformAnnouncementsDescription: Workbench notices generated from current connection, job, and data state.
home.announcementTokenEstimate: Token usage is a local estimate
home.helpCenterDescription: Common actions and check paths kept close at hand.
home.helpStartChatDescription: Open a clean context when the work changes.
home.helpCaptureNoteDescription: Save ideas, decisions, and plans for later.
home.helpReviewJobsDescription: Check the next run and any job issues.
home.helpCheckGatewayDescription: Manage models, skills, and Gateway status.

notebookAi.title: Hermes Assistant
notebookAi.description: Ask Hermes for content to insert into the current notebook block.
notebookAi.placeholder: For example: Expand this into a product requirements note and keep useful Markdown structure
notebookAi.insertBelowHint: Insert as a new block after the current content
notebookAi.polishPrompt: Please polish this passage while keeping the original meaning and improving the writing.
notebookAi.emptyResponse: Hermes did not return any insertable content

notebook.title: Notebook
notebook.emptyTitle: Choose a note or create a new one
notebook.emptyDescription: The editor opens here after you choose a note in the middle panel.
notebook.directorySubtitle: Search, create, and organize the current note collection
notebook.searchHelper: Quickly find notes in the current results
